chunks.text: MAK/PS ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI Const. Petition No. D-592 of 2025 __________________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature(s) of Judge(s) Priority. 1. For orders on office objections. 2. For hearing of Misc. No.3217/25 3. For hearing of main case. 03.06.2025. Mr. Mallag Assa Dashti, Advocate for the Petitioner. Mr. Mohsin Shahwani, Addl. Attorney General of Pakistan. Javed Ahmed Baloch, Addl. Director FIA, ACC, Karachi, Inspector Habib-ur- Rehman, FIA and SIP M. Nasir PS Preedy, Karachi. ------------------------------ We have been informed that the petitioners are out of Pakistan for unknown period. Reply to shows cause notice filed by the I.O. Habib-ur-Rehman seems to be reasonable as the same is hereby vacated. Four notices have been issued against the petitioners which all have been refused to receive. I.O. Habib-ur-Rehman handed over the copies of notice to the learned counsel for the petitioners in court today. I.O. is directed as and when Petitioner came to Pakistan he will carry out his inquiry and complete the same expeditiously. The instant petition stands disposed of in the above terms alongwith all pending applications. HEAD OF CONST. BENCHES JUDGE
